---
title: "Blog"
author: ""
description: "Adams Ceballos's blog"
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
freeze: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
</style>

:::{#posts}
:::
